sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61619" key="laqrofage/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαθροφᾰγ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n61619.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eat secretly</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0475.tlg001:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Metag.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
